description: Column specification for NOAA GHCN-Daily validation Parquet files stored in data/raw/noaa/.
purpose: Ground-station observations used to cross-validate CMIP6 historical data and establish baseline climate statistics independently of model data.
format: Apache Parquet, wide format (one row = one calendar day)
data_source: NOAA Global Historical Climatology Network Daily (GHCN-D) via NOAA NCEI API (https://www.ncdc.noaa.gov/cdo-web/api/v2/)

date.description: Observation date (local station time, treated as UTC)

tmax.null_handling: keep as NaN — do not interpolate without documenting

awnd.description: Average daily wind speed (GHCN-D element: AWND). May be absent at some stations.
awnd.null_handling: keep as NaN — not all stations record wind

notes: NOAA data has gaps — do not assume daily completeness.
Wind speed (awnd) is often missing — cross-check against ERA5 baseline if needed.
Relative humidity (hurs) and solar radiation (rsds) are NOT available from GHCN-D; use ERA5 baseline for those variables.
Temperature units in raw GHCN-D are tenths of degrees C — convert on ingestion.
